title: ayapanopsis beckii
intro: Ayapanopsis beckii, also known as the 'Mayan tea tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayapanopsis beckii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Ayapanopsis beckii can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves, or as a tincture or capsule by extracting its active compounds, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
